title: juniperus sabina subsp. arenaria
intro: Juniperus sabina subsp. arenaria, also known as Rocky Mountain juniper, is a subspecies of the juniper tree that is native to the mountainous regions of North America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and diuretic properties, which can help to treat a variety of health issues such as kidney stones and urinary tract infections. The health benefits of Rocky Mountain juniper include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve circulation, and aid in digestion, making it a popular herbal remedy for digestive issues and arthritis. Juniperus sabina subsp. arenaria is typically prepared as a tea, tincture, or oil, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
